query:
SELECT r.id, r.workWeekId, r.origin, r.destination, r.distance, w.weekStartDate, w.weekEndDate 
FROM routes r 
LEFT JOIN workWeeks w ON r.workWeekId = w.id 
ORDER BY r.id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3sRqUHF8XN3ZoC5.root --database TxqCX6S8q4gdowFzJxKWVn --execute SELECT r.id, r.workWeekId, r.origin, r.destination, r.distance, w.weekStartDate, w.weekEndDate 
FROM routes r 
LEFT JOIN workWeeks w ON r.workWeekId = w.id 
ORDER BY r.id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
